OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-04-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: J. Rumsey; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Nasir Patel is present and in Pro Per.
Defendant Leon McNeely is present and appearing with Limited Scope Attorney,Aaron Morrison.

The Judge Quidachay, litigants and counsel meet and confer in Dept. 501, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
The trial date of October 09, 2012 is vacated.
